# SalesQL — Pricing

## Monthly Billing Plans

| Plan | Monthly | Credits/mo | Seats | Features |
|------|---------|------------|-------|----------|
| Free | $0 | 50 | 1 | Verified emails only; no exports, integrations, or API |
| Basic | $39 | 2,000 | 1 | Emails + phone, exports, integrations, CSV enrichment (1k rows), verifier (5k) |
| Professional | $79 | 5,000 | 3 | Emails + phone, unlimited exports, CSV (5k rows), verifier (10k), API access |
| Organization | $119 | 12,000 | 15 | Emails + phone, unlimited exports, CSV (50k rows), verifier (20k), API access |

*1 credit = 1 prospect record (emails + phone + enriched data).*

## Annual Billing Plans (25% discount)

| Plan | Annual | Credits/yr | Email Verifier Credits |
|------|--------|------------|------------------------|
| Free | $0 | 600 | — |
| Basic | $348 | 24,000 | 60,000 |
| Professional | $708 | 60,000 | 120,000 |
| Organization | $1,068 | 144,000 | 240,000 |

## Feature Comparison

| Feature | Free | Basic | Professional | Organization |
|---------|------|-------|--------------|--------------|
| Verified Emails | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Phone Numbers | — | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Unlimited Exports | — | — | ✓ | ✓ |
| Integrations | — | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| CSV Enrichment | — | 1k rows | 5k rows | 50k rows |
| Email Verifier | — | 5k credits | 10k credits | 20k credits |
| API Access | — | — | ✓ | ✓ |
| Folders Supported | 3 | 3 | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| API Rate Limit | — | — | 5k calls/day | 20k calls/day |

## Credit Constraints

- Credits non-accumulative; renew and expire on plan renewal date
- 1 credit = 1 prospect record (emails + phone + enriched data)
- Email verifier credits are separate from main credits
- Free plan: no phone numbers, integrations, CSV enrichment, bulk verification, or API

## TCO Notes

- Competitive entry point at $39/mo for Basic with 2,000 credits
- Professional at $79/mo with API access and 3 seats is ideal for small teams
- 25% annual discount makes Professional $59/mo equivalent (annualized)
- Phone number inclusion differentiates from email-only tools like Prospeo
- Credit system allows mixing lead gen + verification in single tool
- API access (Professional+) enables integration with n8n, Make, Clay workflows
